titlestmt.titleproper: First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca records4045
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2019-11-27 00:05:15 +0000.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca records
did.abstract: Subjects include annual reports; births; baptisms; marriages; deaths; buildings and grounds; church finances, governance, history, library, manuals, membership, organizations, and publications; missionary work; pastors; special events; Sunday school; youth programs; Bibles; prayerbooks; music and hymnals; blueprints and maps; and other records of the First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca, Tompkins County, New York.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca was organized January 24, 1804 by Rev. Jedediah Chapman.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subjects include annual reports; births; baptisms; marriages; deaths; buildings and grounds; church finances, governance, history, library, manuals, membership, organizations, and publications; missionary work; pastors; special events; Sunday school; youth programs; Bibles; prayerbooks; music and hymnals; blueprints and maps; and other records of the First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca, Tompkins County, New York.

Also included is a 5 DVD set of Called to be the First by Elizabeth McKeen and "100 Years of Reflections, 1904-2004," 2009; and a phonograph record of a concert at the church, "The Seven Last Words of Christ," recorded by the Cornell Recording Service of the Cornell Radio Guild, Inc., ca. 1951.

Photographs and files relating to the Kay-Billie-Klaer (KBK) Academy in Ghana, originally sponsored and supported by members of the First Presbyterian Church and named for Kay Ensworth, Billie Philbrick, and Betty Klaer and created by Akrofi and Awo Dzrietror, a couple from Ghana (Akrofi received a M.S. and Ph.D. in Agronomy at Cornell and Awo studied child development at TC3).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca records, #4045. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 2-7, 17, 20-21, 23-26, 36, 41-42, 56-65 restricted to the written permission of the Clerk of Session of the First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca.

unittitle.extref: Link to the OLD printed finding aid. Seachable PDF.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Not all the material in the collection is covered by the printed finding aid and the printed finding aid above, the guide below is more current.

did.unittitle: Annual reports; births; baptisms; marriages; deaths; buildings and grounds
Buildings and grounds; list of blueprints and maps; Church and community; Church finances
Church governance; Church history; Church library; Church manuals and membership
Church manuals and membership; Church organizations
Church publications; employment; educational programs, Groton community parish; miscellaneous
Miscellaneous; miscellaneous books, music and hymnals; missionary literature; missionary work; pastors
First Presbyterian Church in Cayuta (Newfield) records, 2 vols.
Newspaper clippings; pastors; planning; presbytery; synod; United Presbyterian Church of America; religious publications and periodicals; special events; social events
Births; baptisms; marriages; deaths; Bibles, prayer books, etc.; Church attendance; Church finances
Church governance; Church history; Church manuals and membership; Church organizations
Church property; miscellaneous books; missionary literature; missionary work
Pastors; Presbyterian Church, Ithaca: authors; presbytery; synod; United Presbyterian Church of America; Sunday school
Church finances; Church governance; miscellaneous; missionary work; pastors
Church Finances; Church Organizations; Newspaper Clippings; Pastors; Religious Publications and Periodicals
Ithaca, N.Y. First Presbyterian Church, Articles of Faith [formerly Rare/BX/9211/I89/F51]
Miscellaneous, 1854, 1880, 1902, 1914, 1922, 1934, 1935; record of Sunday School classes 1933-34, 1934-35, 1937-38
Meetings of the Woman's Missionary Society
Monday Evening Missionary Society, Secretary's Book, Book II
Constitution of Monday Evening Missionary Society
Woman's Missionary Society: Officers and Committees
Report of Monday Evening Missionary Society
Letters of the President of the Society, 1881, 1882
Correspondence to & from Mrs. Stryker in Utah re Mormonism
Form: Board of Home Missions, Paw Paw Grove, Illinois
Form: Presbyterian Board of Relief for Disabled Ministers
Women's Aid Society documents collected by Miss Augusta Williams
Miscellany, 1886, 1887, 1917-1918, 1920, 1934, 1942: resolution on death of Henry Shaler Williams , 1918; David Stewart Curry letter, 1920
Constitution of the Sunday School of the First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca, New York (2 c.)
Sunday School Files: Teachers, Orricers, Members, Junior Department, Intermediate, Senior
Sunday School Superintendents and Officers Meeting minutes
Rev. W. Wisner, "The Line of Demarcation between the Secular Kingdoms of this World and the Spiritual Kingdom of the Lord Jesus Christ"
Rev. A. S. Fiske, "Progress of Christianity in the 19th Century," "A Sermon to the Young"
Installation of the Rev. J. Frederick Fitschen, Jr. (program)
Installation of the Reverend John MacIntosh (program)
Resolution on Rev. MacIntosh moving to different church
Letters of Dismission and Acceptance; student and temporary membership cards and certificates, 1920-1925
Ordination Service of William Spaulding Eaton
Installation Service of Rev. Donald A. Acton
"My Deaconship" form for Clayton E. Weber
"Worship in the Presence of God," Sermon by H. A. Moran
Documents concerning Rev. P. D. Clark
Papers related to Rev. D. G. Howland
Services in Commemoration of the One Hundredth Anniversary of the First Presbyterian Church of Ithaca, New York, 1/21/1904
Service of Dedication, First Presbyterian Church, 4/13/1911
New Members, Baptisms, Deaths as recorded in Bulletins
Community Training School of Religious Education, Season 1924
Applications, Registrations, Students for Week Day School of Religious Education
Questions: Old Testament Narrative, text book: Burgess, "Life of Christ"
Questions: "Great Men of the Christian Centuries"
Questions: "Organization and Administration of the Church School"
Letter from Superintendent Ithaca Public Schools to Rev. Beattie re submitting All Examination Questions to State Education Dept., 3/31/1924
"Transformation by the renewal of the Mind," 1/8/1928
"In the sermons which I have been preaching in recent weeks...,"
"Why my bit of labor that has been done on ...,"
"We are confronted here by a problem which ...,"
"It would be the sherest [sic] presumption on my part if ...,"
"Reckon ye also yourselves to be dead indeed unto sin but alive with God through Jesus Christ ...,"
"Happy is he that condemneth not himself in that thing which he alloweth,"
"How can I do this great wickedness, and sin against God,"
"Your foreign missionary committee would respectly [sic] report ....,"
"Jesus came into Galilee preaching the Gospel of God,
"Let your loins be girded about and your lamps burning ...,"
Rev. M. Hardin printed and typescript sermons
Religion in the Life of Abraham Lincoln," 2/13/1921
"Shall there be Intellectual Freedom in the Presbyterian Church?," 11/5/1922
"The General Assembly, Mr. Bryan and Dr. Fosdick, 5/27/1923
"What Are the Modernists Trying to Do?," 1/20/1924
"In My Father's House," 7/1926 (published in "The Church Tower)
"The President of the United States on Lawlessness," [t.s.]
Receipts and Receipts with Thank-you letters
Receipts and Receipts with Thank-you letters
Receipts and Receipts with Thank-you letters
Receipts and Receipts with Thank-you letters
Synodical Home Missions Correspondence and Receipts
Tompkins County National Bank Account of E. Plathert
Tompkins County National Bank of E. Gilbert
Document: E. C. Stewart part of will pertaining to Church
R. B. Williams: documents relating to Trusts, Bequests, 1883, 1923, 1935
Every Member Canvass, Special Committee - F. C. [Finance Committee]
Every Member Canvass, Pledge Campaign: Returns
Envelope Account Books, Vols. I, II
Woman's Aid Society First Presbyterian Church Treasurer's Book
4 cancelled checks of Miss Ch. Williams
Woman's Missionary Society Annual Treasurer's Reports, 1909-1912, 1914-1919
List of Presidents of Woman's Aid
Notes and letters re pastoral nominations, 1919,
Manual of First Presbyterian Church, Ithaca, N.Y., Adopted 4/9/1931
Portland Point S. S. Benevolences Account
Envelope Fund, Session Fund, Church Library, Reserve Fund, S. S. Library
Treasurer's Accounts: Benevolent Fund, Manse Fund Pledges
Receipts Book IV, Nos. 376-500 Tan-Z and Misc.
Receipts 1929-1930 Bk. V, #500-545, Pledged but not using envelopes
"The Seven Last Words of Christ" - phonograph record of a concert at the church

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: -Recorded by the Cornell Recording Service of the Cornell Radio Guild, Inc.

did.unittitle: Floor plan, 106 E. Court St. (preliminary sketch)
Floor plan negative, 114 Catherine St., City assessment map, 106, 110, 114
Floor plans and plans for kitchen remodeling, 114 E. Court St.
Floor plan for Church, 4 drawings: plans for Church electrical system
Chart of Church pews, 3rd ediface, Presbyterian Church FRAGILE
City Assessment map showing 106, 110, 114 E. Court St.
Preliminary plans, Westminster Manor, Home for the Elderly;, Auburn, NY
Plans for Church, room and door schedules and others
Plans for fireplace, date and place unknown
Map of properties owned by First Presbyterian Church
Plans First Presbyterian Church alterations: room and door schedules, elevations, structural, heating and ventilating, plumbing, electrical
Blueprints and maps (on file, 1964): a list of maps and blueprints of church buildings and grounds
Plans of 2nd and 3rd level of Church [on backing (2)]
Map "The Contribution of Presbyterian National Missions to the Making of a Christian America"
Floor plans - Missionary Apartments, 114 Catherine St. (17 drawings)
Preliminary Renovation Plans, 1st Presbyterian Church, Ithaca NY
Notes/lists of books sent to KBK

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: By Frank Amfo Sackey and Akrofi Dzietror

did.unittitle: KBK School Complex Plan; 4 classroom construction and financial statement
